title: Chef Aid 12 Cup Shallow Bun Tin, Made from Durable and Robust Carbon Steel, Non-Stick Goldflon Coating, 31.5 x 24 cm
features: EVERDAY USE: This non-stick, easy clean, 12 Cup shallow bun tin is ideal for making homemade treats such as Mince Pies Bite sized appetisers and Various different Tarts

FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Bun Tin can store cooked goods in the fridge or freezer; Meaning its ideal for meal prep and leftovers; Simply take the Bun tin straight from freezer to oven to cook or reheat ideally every time
NON-STICK: Remove Cooked and baked goods with ease with this quality non stick goldflon coating; The non-stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free
DURABLE: This quality Bun tin is made from carbon steel which will prevent warping when cooking all manner of foods, measuring 31.5 x 24 x 1.4 cm

CHEF AID: The well known non-stick cookware range is a loved and popular range of products that caters for both domestic and commercial uses; This range of products is essential and built for everyday use
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home. Bakeware Icing and Baking Food Prep Tools and Gadgets Cooking and BBQ Household Essentials Next page
